title: 500 Pcs Wooden Hearts for Crafting, Wooden Hearts Confetti Wedding Embellishments Craft Small Wood Heart Shapes Pieces Slice for Decorations

【Safe and Delicate】- These wooden heart wedding confetti made of quality natural pine, healthy and eco-friendly, polishing and smooth surface, exquisite looks, durable and solid.
【Multiple Sizes】 - The size of wooden slice include 1cm x 3mm, 2cm x 3mm, 3cm x 3mm, 4cm x 3mm, different size bring you more imagination and creativity.

【Easy to DIY】-- You can find countless ways to personalize these wood hearts embellishment, they can be painted, simply sculptured and stained with different colour ink etc, DIY according to your own needs to make it individuation and versatile
【Multi-usage】-- Mini wooden love shaped slices are great choices for art, crafts making, perfect for tags, scrapbooking, Christmas tree decorations, wedding decoration, house ornaments and more
description: small wooden heart confetti allow you have different and individual crafts/decorations Features: Mini wooden hearts are suitable embellishments for making crafts, scrapbook, personalized projects, wedding decorations and more, they are a good match for natural finishes. Wooden pieces come in heart shapes are in natural colors, you can ink, paint or stain them in your own creative ways to create embellishments of your own style and colors you can also curve patterns, letters, etc. on them to make some personal handicrafts.
